creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-01-15 01:44:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    astro                Makefile 
  Added files:
    astro/merkaartor     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Merkaartor is an openstreetmap mapping program. Merkaartor focuses on
  providing a visually pleasing but performant editing environment for
  free geographical data.
  
  It is based on Qt4.
  
  WWW: http://www.merkaartor.org/
  
  PR:             130338
  Submitted by:   Slaven Rezic <slaven at rezic dot de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.128     +1 -0      ports/astro/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/astro/merkaartor/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/astro/merkaartor/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/astro/merkaartor/pkg-descr (new)
